accountName.description: The displayed name of the user account.

activeDirectoryObjectGuid.description: The unique user identifier assigned by the on-premises Active Directory.

azureAdUserId.description: The user object identifier in Microsoft Entra ID.

displayName.description: The user display name in Microsoft Entra ID.

domainName.description: The name of the Active Directory domain of which the user is a member.

resourceAccessEvents.description: Information on resource access attempts made by the user account.

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name of the account in Microsoft Entra ID.

userSid.description: The local security identifier of the user account.
